description.ko: 끊임없는 네온사인의 불빛으로 물든 거대한 대도시. 비에 젖은 아스팔트가 거대한 홀로그램 광고와 높이 솟은 하늘 다리의 선명한 색상을 반사합니다.
description.en: A sprawling metropolis bathed in the glow of endless neon signs. Rainy asphalt reflects the vibrant colors of massive holographic advertisements and soaring sky-bridges.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a sprawling cyberpunk megacity at night, heavy rain, glowing neon signs in pink and cyan, massive holographic advertisements, flying cars traversing between futuristic skyscrapers, wet reflective streets, hyper-detailed, 8k resolution, blade runner aesthetic.
